creator: umq@ueo.co.jp
text:
At Tue, 11 Mar 2008 03:31:40 +0900,
I wrote:
> > The WITH_SENDMAIL_PORT must be the culprit then!
> I'm wondering how can I solve this...

Under FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE/6.3-RELEASE (or later),
sendmail in base system is 8.14.2.
This means libmilter installed with mail/sendmail port is
the same as in base system.

So, unless you delete base sendmail, just omitting
``WITH_SENDMAIL_PORT=yes'' would work okay
for the moment.

Regards,
-- 
end

 Hirohisa Yamaguchi
 umq@ueo.co.jp
